_README: Copy this file to song-videos.json to activate the WATCH section. The real
song-videos.json is intentionally NOT committed — only this .example.json is.
Shape: an object keyed by the NORMALIZED song title (normalizeTitle in
build.mjs: lowercase, ampersands -> 'and', all non-alphanumerics stripped).
Each value is an array of video entries. Only entries with official:true are
ever rendered. Selection per song: if the song was first played before
2002-08-11 (the Michael Houser era) AND a { era: 'houser' } entry exists, that
one is chosen; otherwise the first entry in the array is used.
youtubeId  - the 11-char YouTube video id (from watch?v=<id> or youtu.be/<id>)
title      - human label used for the play button's accessible name
official   - must be true to render; anything else is ignored
